abilities.name: 부식
abilities.description: 강철타입이나 독타입도 독 상태로 만들 수 있다.

flavorTexts.text: It absorbs nutrients from cave walls. The petals it wears are made of crystallized poison.
Glimmet’s toxic mineral crystals look just like flower petals. This Pokémon scatters poisonous powder like pollen to protect itself.
